name: Zalatoris II Acquisition Corp.
description: Zalatoris II Acquisition Corp. is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) incorporated in the Cayman Islands. Formerly known as XPAC Acquisition Corp., the company was established to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It focuses its search on companies operating within the healthcare, financial services, education, consumer goods, retail, and technology sectors, with a particular emphasis on opportunities in Brazil. As a SPAC, the company does not engage in any active business operations or generate revenue prior to completing its initial business combination.
